message:
feat(ir): add graph-level IR with subgraphs, typed nodes, and typed edges

Introduce a parallel graph-level intermediate representation
(MermaidGraphIr) alongside the existing flat IR. This adds:

- IrSubgraphId/IrSubgraph for hierarchical subgraph modeling with
  parent-child relationships and cluster associations
- IrNodeKind and IrEdgeKind enums for semantic node/edge classification
  (Entity, Participant, State, Message, Dependency, etc.)
- IrGraphNode, IrGraphEdge, IrGraphCluster wrapper types that track
  cluster and subgraph membership per node
- MermaidGraphIr container with accessor/query methods (find_subgraph_by_key,
  root_subgraphs, etc.)
- Graph IR population in ir_builder, dot_parser, and mermaid_parser
- Integration test assertions for subgraph and cluster membership

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
